name: sattline-vscode
description: VS Code client for the SattLint-based SattLine language server.

sattlineLsp.pythonPath.description: Python interpreter used to launch the SattLine language server. Leave empty to auto-detect the workspace .venv or python.defaultInterpreterPath.

sattlineLsp.entryFile.description: Root program file to load when editing library files in a workspace with multiple .s/.x programs. Relative values are resolved from the workspace root.

sattlineLsp.mode.description: SattLine code mode used when resolving matching source and dependency extensions.

sattlineLsp.scanRootOnly.description: If enabled, only parse the configured root program instead of recursively loading dependencies.

sattlineLsp.enableVariableDiagnostics.description: Publish SattLint variable diagnostics for saved files in addition to syntax diagnostics from the open buffer.

sattlineLsp.workspaceDiagnosticsMode.description: Whether the language server should keep workspace-wide semantic diagnostics warm in the background after startup and save operations.

sattlineLsp.maxCompletionItems.description: Maximum number of completion items returned by the SattLine language server.
